name: runforge
description: Agentic Engineering Harness for safe failure triage.

scripts.dogfood: pnpm check:governance && pnpm check:structure && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm validation:run && pnpm demo:typecheck-failure && pnpm demo:test-failure && pnpm demo:env-config-failure
scripts.demo:run-repo-research: tsx src/cli/index.ts run --task repo-research --repo ./fixtures/repos/sample-js --goal "Map package scripts" --out ./artifacts/runs/demo-repo-research
scripts.demo:run-context-pack: tsx src/cli/index.ts run --task context-pack --repo ./fixtures/repos/sample-js --goal "Prepare local context" --log ./fixtures/logs/typecheck-failure.log --out ./artifacts/runs/demo-context-pack
scripts.demo:run-code-proposal: tsx src/cli/index.ts run --task code-proposal --repo ./fixtures/repos/sample-js --goal "Propose a calculator fix" --out ./artifacts/runs/demo-code-proposal
scripts.demo:external-check: tsx src/cli/index.ts external check --repo ./fixtures/repos/sample-js --command "node --version" --command "node -e \"console.error('demo failure'); process.exit(1)\"" --out ./artifacts/runs/external-check-demo
scripts.demo:external-check-setup-diagnostic: tsx src/cli/index.ts external check --repo ./fixtures/repos/sample-js --setup-command "node -e \"console.error('setup failed for diagnostic demo'); process.exit(1)\"" --continue-after-setup-failure --command "node -e \"console.log('diagnostic main command ran')\"" --out ./artifacts/runs/external-check-setup-diagnostic-demo
scripts.demo:external-failure-triage: tsx src/cli/index.ts external failure-triage --repo ./fixtures/repos/sample-js --command "node -e \"console.error('AssertionError: expected 1 to equal 2'); process.exit(1)\"" --out ./artifacts/runs/external-failure-triage-demo
scripts.demo:external-proposal-readiness: tsx src/cli/index.ts external proposal-readiness --repo ./fixtures/repos/sample-js --command "node -e \"console.error('AssertionError: expected 1 to equal 2'); process.exit(1)\"" --out ./artifacts/runs/external-proposal-readiness-demo
scripts.demo:external-code-proposal: tsx src/cli/index.ts external code-proposal --repo ./fixtures/repos/sample-js --command "node -e \"const fs=require('fs'); const text=fs.readFileSync('tests/calculator.test.ts','utf8'); if (text.includes('toBe(2)')) process.exit(0); console.error('AssertionError: expected add(1, 1) assertion to expect 2'); process.exit(1);\"" --out ./artifacts/runs/external-code-proposal-demo
scripts.demo:packet-view-index: tsx src/cli/index.ts packet index --root ./validation/runs --out /tmp/runforge-demo-view-index && tsx src/cli/index.ts packet view-index --index /tmp/runforge-demo-view-index/index.json --out /tmp/runforge-demo-viewers
scripts.demo:packet-query: tsx src/cli/index.ts packet index --root ./validation/runs --out /tmp/runforge-demo-packet-query-index && tsx src/cli/index.ts packet query --index /tmp/runforge-demo-packet-query-index/index.json --out /tmp/runforge-demo-packet-query --outcome provider_rejected
scripts.task-run:demo: tsx src/cli/index.ts task-run start --task "Check roadmap docs consistency" --out validation/runs/TASK-RUN-2
scripts.demo:dashboard:
tsx src/cli/index.ts packet index --root ./validation/runs --out /tmp/runforge-alpha14-demo-index --dashboard-seed && tsx src/cli/index.ts dashboard build --seed /tmp/runforge-alpha14-demo-index/dashboard-seed.json --out /tmp/runforge-alpha14-demo-dashboard && printf 'Index path: /tmp/runforge-alpha14-demo-index
Dashboard HTML path: /tmp/runforge-alpha14-demo-dashboard/index.html
Dashboard data path: /tmp/runforge-alpha14-demo-dashboard/dashboard-data.json
'
scripts.demo:admin-ui-4: tsx src/cli/index.ts admin demo --out /tmp/runforge-admin-ui && tsx src/cli/index.ts admin action-plan --config /tmp/runforge-admin-ui-config.json --out /tmp/runforge-action-plan.md
scripts.demo:external-docs-cli:
tsx src/cli/index.ts external docs-proposal --repo ./tests/fixtures/external-docs-repo --target README.md --evidence README.md --evidence package.json --evidence docs/BUILD_STABILITY.md --anchor "npm run dev
\`\`\`" --insert "

For the stable frontend dev path, use the existing root command:

\`\`\`bash
npm run dev:stable
\`\`\`" --rationale "package.json exposes dev:stable, and docs/BUILD_STABILITY.md documents it." --out ./artifacts/runs/external-docs-cli-demo
scripts.demo:external-docs-cli:files: tsx src/cli/index.ts external docs-proposal --repo ./tests/fixtures/external-docs-repo --target README.md --evidence README.md --evidence package.json --evidence docs/BUILD_STABILITY.md --anchor-file ./examples/external-docs-proposal-inputs/anchor.txt --insert-file ./examples/external-docs-proposal-inputs/insert.md --rationale-file ./examples/external-docs-proposal-inputs/rationale.md --out ./artifacts/runs/external-docs-cli-files-demo
scripts.test: corepack pnpm check:structure && PATH="$PWD/scripts/bin:$PATH" vitest run
